selected_validations.reason: Phase 1 work must stay focused on the Cranfield/OpenSearch baseline and avoid unearned architecture.
Search and explain endpoints must exercise actual request generation and response mapping behavior.

tools_or_methods: scripts/export-cranfield.mjs public source check when network is available
scripts/load-cranfield-opensearch.mjs live load when credentials exist
selected_validations.reason: Source modules, local MDE state, index artifacts, and reproducible Cranfield export artifacts must remain parseable and runnable.

tools_or_methods: live OpenSearch latency measurement when credentials exist
selected_validations.reason: The mission requires latency tracking. Point latency is collected in live responses; broader p95 sampling remains a follow-up before public latency claims.

tools_or_methods: browser visual inspection when a browser connector is available
selected_validations.reason: Users need a first-screen search interface plus indexed-data context so they can try useful Cranfield queries without reading source code.
Readers need aggregate metrics plus concrete correct, wrong, and missed examples to understand what the baseline proves and where it fails.

tools_or_methods: runtime source scan for LLM providers
selected_validations.reason: The live search path must not call an LLM and secrets must not be committed.

tools_or_methods: Cloudflare deployment check when credentials exist
selected_validations.reason: Phase 1 requires public endpoints and a usable public interface backed by live OpenSearch.
Every mission, article, experiment, architecture version, decision, tag, and endpoint must be navigable through stable identifiers before Phase 2 adds more experiments.

validation_gates.second_pass_policy: Rerun all Critical validations, all changed validations, and deployment blocker checks with no implementation, test, strategy, or validator changes between passes.
